_meta.title: Kling V3.0 Audio I2V + FLF Pipeline
_meta.description: Complete pipeline: T2I (Flux/Flash) → Kling V3.0 I2V with Audio → Optional FLF mode. First workflow to integrate Kling's native audio generation with first-last-frame video control.
_meta.author: ComfyUI Learning PostGrad#13

inputs.text: A cute cartoon lobster wearing a white chef hat and apron, cooking enthusiastically in a professional kitchen. Warm lighting, vibrant cartoon illustration style.

inputs.prompt: The cartoon lobster chef cooks enthusiastically, flipping food in a sizzling pan. Steam rises. Kitchen sounds: sizzling oil, chopping, gentle background music.

_meta.title: Kling V3.0 I2V + Audio
_meta.notes: sound=true enables native audio generation. Duration supports 3-15s. Cost: ~¥0.55 for std tier (audio included free). Audio is generated in-sync with video content based on prompt description.

_comment_flf2: To use FLF mode, generate a second frame and connect to KlingStartEndToVideoNode

inputs.text: A cute cartoon lobster wearing a white chef hat, proudly presenting a beautifully plated gourmet dish. Confetti and sparkles, celebration mood, same professional kitchen. Vibrant cartoon illustration style.

inputs.prompt: The lobster chef cooks enthusiastically, transitions from cooking to proudly presenting the finished dish. Kitchen sounds: sizzling, chopping, triumphant bell ding, celebratory music.

_meta.title: Kling V3.0 FLF + Audio
_meta.notes: First-Last-Frame with audio. Uses same endpoint as I2V but with lastImageUrl parameter. Verified working via RunningHub API in PostGrad#13 experiment #63.
